era_context: Early Bronze Age III; Fifth Dynasty Egypt; Mesopotamian Early Dynastic IIIb; Mature Harappan Indus Valley Civilization. A period of established urban civilization with long-distance trade networks.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: 2956 BCE is not documented in any surviving historical source. Like 2957 BCE, this year falls within a period where annual documentation does not exist outside of Egyptian king lists, which provide a chronological framework but not year-by-year event records. The historical record for this year is entirely blank.
